title: The Hidden Secrets of the Nightclub

scenes.text: A woman disappears from a bustling nightclub with no leads.
It happened in Miami, at the Clevelander Hotel.
In 2015, 21-year-old Alayna Ertl vanished after a night out with friends, leaving no trace.
The nightclub remains a popular spot, unaware of the lingering mystery.
Extensive searches have turned up no sign of Alayna.
scenes.label: UNSOLVED MYSTERY

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Miami, USA - 2015. A young woman named Alayna Ertl goes missing after a night at the Clevelander Hotel, leaving behind a mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!
